text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

72 
DGNS_VRSN_CD 
LABEL: 
Diagnosis Version Code (ICD-9 or ICD-10) 
DESCRIPTION: The code is used to indicate if the diagnosis code is ICD-9 or ICD-10. 
SHORT NAME: DGNS_VRSN_CD 
LONG NAME: DGNS_VRSN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
Null/missing = ICD-9 
9 = ICD-9 
0 = ICD-10 
COMMENT: 
ICD-10 codes were used starting October 2015. 
This field was populated only in 2009 and 2010.
